unsupported.title: Unsupported Browser
unsupported.message: This application requires a supported desktop browser (Chrome, Edge, Safari). Please access from a desktop computer.

consent.title: Privacy Notice
consent.description: To participate in the interview, you must consent to audio/video recording and processing of your personal data for evaluation purposes. You may withdraw consent at any time. For more information, please see our privacy policy.
consent.accept_aria: I accept the terms and proceed to the interview
consent.decline_aria: I decline and will not proceed to the interview
